name: hpsilab-mcp-server
display_name: Quant Finance MCP Server by HPSILab
description: Quant finance MCP server for stock analysis, options analytics, implied volatility, Monte Carlo simulation, AI prediction, and backtesting.
author: Haiyun Hu

tools.name: analyze_stock
tools.description: Aggregate stock analysis for quantitative finance research

tools.name: get_ai_prediction
tools.description: AI stock prediction and model consensus

tools.name: get_iv_radar
tools.description: Implied volatility rank, percentile, skew and regime

tools.name: get_option_pressure
tools.description: Options analytics for pressure zones, gamma walls and max pain

tools.name: generate_stock_images
tools.description: Generate stock analysis and options chart images

tools.name: generate_stock_research_report
tools.description: Generate stock research reports for financial analysis
